//: How KIFF is AI-ready. Fast-paced: reveal-early nav/scroll, short lines, and NATURAL attention gestures — the cursor traces what the line is describing (point) and emphasizes key spots (click → DemoTape auto-zooms). On plain-text pages (llms.txt, the skill .md) gestures use normalized nx/ny coords to trace reading lines; on the agent page they point at real headings/links. osClick+Accessibility make the emphasis clicks register the zoom.

scenes.say: KIFF is built AI-first. This is the page agents land on.
It spells out the real decision call: one request that comes back allowed, approval-required, blocked, or invalid — before anything runs.
We publish an llms dot txt — the whole product, machine-readable, for any model to read at a glance.
And a skill, kiff dash domains, so your coding agent authors a domain right in your repo, from one instruction.
Machine page, llms map, agent skill — KIFF is made for an assistant to discover, integrate, and extend.
